publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-11-22 18:43:42 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Punk and underground music related magazines and fanzines. Also files on bands and punk venues that include flyers, posters, and other ephemera. The remainder of the collection, which includes 500 LP, 45, and CD recordings, along with approximately 100 related books have been cataloged individually.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Punk and underground music related magazines and fanzines. Also files on bands and punk venues that include flyers, posters, and other ephemera. The remainder of the collection, which includes 500 LP, 45, and CD recordings, along with approximately 100 related books have been cataloged individually.

emph.ref: Series II. Band and Record Label Files
Series V. Sound and Video Recordings

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Geoffrey Weiss Punk Collection, #8054. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: BOB 4; 7" flexi accompanying Bucketfull of Brains no. 10

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: No. 53; Australian Punk and Post-Punk Record and Tape Discography

did.unittitle: Los Angeles Phonograph Record Magazine, The

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes flyers, clippings, press packs, photographs, and other promotional materials.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Concert poster with Adolescents, D.O.A., and Minutemen at the Santa Monica Civic

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains production cost estimates and artwork for the "Flipper Twist" single.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains promotional posters for releases from The Users, Lockjaw, Radio Stars, and Minor Threat.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains promotional posters for releases from Headache, Skrewdriver, Hüsker Dü, Poptopia, Buzzcocks, Pointed Sticks, Sleepers, Laughing Clowns, Scorched Earth Policy, and The Verlaines.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes advertising rates for Slash magazine and promotional planning for X's "Los Angeles" LP.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes documents and promotional materials for Bug Radio, Music View, New Route, and Rap Down!

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes show posters for Los Crudos (final show), New Order, Snakefinger, and Radio Birdman/Iggy Pop.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains oversize flyers for shows featuring Sonic Youth, Swans, Saccharine Trust, The Last, The Plugz, The Plimsouls, Crime, The Zeros, Roky Erickson, and others.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes advertisements for fanzines and record stores and a "Vote for Nobody" political flyer.

did.unittitle: Recording Heathen Earth, Live at Oundle School
Large photograph of punk jacket with arm band and band buttons
